description: Perform a comparative distribution analysis on the 'food.gdt' dataset by categorizing 'food_exp' based on income levels. Create a dummy variable 'high_income' (1 if 'income' > 20, 0 otherwise) and derive two series: 'food_hi' (containing 'food_exp' values where high_income is 1) and 'food_lo' (containing 'food_exp' values where high_income is 0). Save the summary statistics for these variables to '/home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/group_stats.txt' and export a combined Kernel Density Estimation (KDE) graph for both series to '/home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/kde_comparison.png'.
